deficiency.description: Terminated employees retain ERP access for an average of 45 days; no quarterly user-access review; no automated de-provisioning.

notes: Audit logic per AS 2201 Steps 1-3 + compensating-control evaluation. A compensating control mitigates only if it (a) addresses the ASSERTION AT RISK and (b) is not itself impaired by the same deficiency (IPE drawn from the affected system). Magnitude is driven by the AUTHORITY of the retained access, not a per-transaction cap. Conclusion is gated on a LOOKBACK of actual terminated-user activity. House-convention labels for the precision/qualification analysis are not verbatim AS 2201 text.
